item.description:
New

  • Global hotkey (default ⌘⇧G) opens Quip from any app; change it or turn it off in Settings.
  • Right-click the menu-bar icon for Settings and Quit.
  • Trending GIFs in the empty view, plus search-term suggestions as you type.
  • Search stickers instead of GIFs, and set a content rating.
  • Drag a GIF into another app, or ⌥-click to copy its link.
  • Filter your favorites once the list grows.

First release

  • Search GIFs from the menu bar and copy any of them to the clipboard with a click.
  • Bring your own free Giphy key.
  • Star the ones you like; Quip keeps the GIFs you've copied and your recent searches close by.
  • A narrow and a wide layout, start at login, and automatic updates.
